sections.paragraph: ἀλλοτριεπίσϰοπος, ου, ὁ [ἀλλότριος, ἐπίσκοπος] there is no consensus on the meaning of this rare word, not otherwise attested until the 4th century: ‘one who meddles in the affairs of others’, meddler, busybody (the rendering preferred by many) 1 Pt 4:15. Also suggested are spy, informer, revolutionist.
